text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Brian! Don't try to wriggle your way outta the Droit—ahem, the dance party by sleepin' in!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't care about those stupid games. Leave me
alone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But you promised to have a dance-off with me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Did not.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see what's goin' on! You're trying to bail out
'cause you've got no confidence in your dance
moves!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Brian?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Y-you're so forceful!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't rile me up.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, from the looks of it, Brian will be
participating today. We're all ready for this year's
Ligne Droite.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I commend you for all your work getting us here,
though I worry you had little time to prepare
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's fine—I was only fulfilling my duties. All that's
left for me is to pick a partner.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Several underclassmen asked for my hand. I'll
have to consider my choice carefully.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh. That makes me tardy, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Here I was certain you were the one.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wouldn't Teio make a good partner?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She's already blessed with a close-knit circle of
friends to choose from. Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I should be the one to decide who I dance with. So, allow me to make a formal invitation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Will you join me for this time of dance and
merriment?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wow... I can't believe you sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...But it would be my pleasure.
